description_long: This electric drill features a robust, rectangular main body with a dark green and black color scheme, accented by metallic and blue highlights on the handles and drill chuck. The rear end is fitted with a wide, textured shoulder rest for stability during use, while the front houses a prominent, conical drill chuck designed to hold various drill bits. Two side handles, one perpendicular and one parallel to the main body, provide additional grip and control, both featuring blue grip sections. The drill's casing appears to be made of durable plastic with visible seams and fasteners, and the handles are reinforced with metal. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty, possibly industrial-grade tool suitable for demanding urban construction or repair tasks.
description: A heavy-duty electric drill with a green and black body, blue-accented handles, and a prominent conical drill chuck, designed for robust urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the drill, including the wide shoulder rest, main body, and extended drill chuck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the conical drill chuck and the symmetrical placement of the side handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drill's length, the main body, and the angled side handle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wide, textured shoulder rest and the alignment of the handles.
